note: Deterministic archetypal story seeds. Primary lookup is by key `${expression}_${soul_urge}` (e.g. `8_6`). Hand-authored entries cover common combinations; missing combinations fall back to the composed three-fragment template. Output is an archetypal pattern, not a personal biography — the user's lived story lives in Living Profile.

8_6.story_seed: You carry the paradox of power and service — you are built to manifest at scale, but the force that drives you is not ambition. It is love. You do not build for yourself. You build so others have somewhere to stand. The world often sees the architect; you know you are the ground.
8_6.keynote: Power through service, structure as devotion

22_6.story_seed: You carry the paradox of vast vision and quiet devotion — you are built to bring the impossible thing into form, but the force that drives you is not ambition. It is love. You do not build for yourself. You build so others have somewhere to stand. The world often sees the architect; you know you are the ground.

1_2.story_seed: You arrive as a beginning, but the longing underneath is for steady company — for one or two true others who walk the new road with you. The world reads you as forward edge; inside, the work is to let the first step become a shared step.

3_7.story_seed: You arrive as a voice — colour, warmth, expression — but the inner longing is for silence that makes meaning audible. Others meet the brightness; you protect the quiet behind it. The work is to let the play be the work without losing the inward room.

4_9.story_seed: You arrive as a builder, placing stones that endure, but the longing underneath is for completion — for leaving the field gentler than you found it. You do not build to prove you can. You build because the long arc asks for it.

5_4.story_seed: You arrive as motion — restless light — but the inner longing is for something that lasts past your hands. The work is to let change and durability stop arguing in you; the road and the stone belong to the same journey.

7_1.story_seed: You arrive as a listener of the deep kind, but the inner longing is to begin — to taste the first step before anyone else. The world reads you as a quiet centre; inside, you are also the one who knows when it is time to open the door.

9_3.story_seed: You arrive as a completer — endings carry through you with grace — but the inner longing is for colour, joy, play. The work is to let the bright thing arrive even at the close; your blessing is not solemn, it is luminous.

11_2.story_seed: You arrive as a tuned instrument — the air reorders near you — but the longing underneath is for the steady company of one or two true others. The signal is for sharing; you are not asked to carry it alone.

33_6.story_seed: You arrive as devotion — the way you live is the teaching — and the inner longing matches it: a home that is also a hearth for others. The work is to keep the hearth lit without burning yourself for warmth.

fallback_template: You arrive as the one keyed to {expression_keynote} ({expression}); inwardly you long for the field that {soul_urge_keynote} ({soul_urge}) makes possible. The work is to let these two voices speak to each other rather than over each other.

expression.1: You arrive in any room as a beginning — the one who opens a way that was not yet there.
expression.2: You arrive as a thread that connects — the one who feels where the weave wants to close.
expression.3: You arrive as a voice — the one who turns inner light into colour and sound.
expression.4: You arrive as a builder — the one who places stone where stone must go.
expression.5: You arrive as motion — the one who refuses to let the field forget that it can change.
expression.6: You arrive as care — the one who tends the place others sit down in.
expression.7: You arrive as a listener of the deep kind — the one who reads beneath the surface text.
expression.8: You arrive as steadiness at scale — the one who can be answerable for large weight.
expression.9: You arrive as a completer — the one who carries endings with grace.
expression.11: You arrive as a tuned instrument — the one whose frequency reorders the air.
expression.22: You arrive as a master builder — the one who brings vision all the way down to form.
expression.33: You arrive as devotion — the one whose teaching is the way they live.

soul_urge.1: Inwardly you long to begin things, to taste the first step before anyone else.
soul_urge.2: Inwardly you long for the steady company of one or two true others.
soul_urge.3: Inwardly you long for the work and the play to be the same thing.
soul_urge.4: Inwardly you long to make something that lasts past your hands.
soul_urge.5: Inwardly you long for a horizon wider than the one in front of you.
soul_urge.6: Inwardly you long for a home that is also a hearth for others.
soul_urge.7: Inwardly you long for silence that makes meaning audible.
soul_urge.8: Inwardly you long to be entrusted with weight and to carry it well.
soul_urge.9: Inwardly you long to leave the field gentler than you found it.
soul_urge.11: Inwardly you long for the high signal to clarify into a daily life.
soul_urge.22: Inwardly you long for the impossible thing to become buildable.
soul_urge.33: Inwardly you long to love at the scale your life is asking for.

personality.1: On the outside you read as someone who moves first — a forward edge.
personality.2: On the outside you read as someone people open up to without quite knowing why.
personality.3: On the outside you read as colour and warmth, an invitation in human form.
personality.4: On the outside you read as someone reliable, plain-spoken, present.
personality.5: On the outside you read as restless light — never quite finished with the room.
personality.6: On the outside you read as someone who carries the small near things tenderly.
personality.7: On the outside you read as a quiet centre — a stillness others can rest near.
personality.8: On the outside you read as authority worn lightly — the long view.
personality.9: On the outside you read as someone whose ending is also a kind of blessing.
personality.11: On the outside you read as luminous attention — a signal that something is being seen.
personality.22: On the outside you read as someone whose vision is already half-built.
personality.33: On the outside you read as a kept fire — quiet, steady, devotional.
